decision: AWS and Snowflake production-sized parity evidence currently supports hash_diff_upsert only. It does not close historical or snapshot_reconcile_soft_delete production parity.

notes: AWS production evidence includes initial load, no-change replay, changed-row wave, overlap guard, duplicate-key failure and null-key failure for hash_diff_upsert.
AWS historical and snapshot modes remain outside the accepted production parity claim.
Snowflake production evidence includes initial load, no-change replay, changed-row wave, overlap guard, duplicate-key failure and null-key failure for hash_diff_upsert.
Snowflake historical and snapshot modes remain outside the accepted production parity claim.

adapters.cross_adapter_decision: Not sufficient to close GCP-BQ-12D until AWS and Snowflake have comparable production-sized historical/snapshot evidence or an explicit product decision accepts GCP-only coverage.

affected_gate.reason: Cross-adapter historical and snapshot production parity is incomplete because the AWS and Snowflake production reports are hash_diff_upsert-only.
